title: Remove mandatory Internet Identity authentication for guestbook entries

requirements.summary: Update the AddEntryPage so that authentication is no longer required to submit the form. Remove any sign-in gate, error message, or disabled state that blocks submission for unauthenticated users.
acceptanceCriteria: The submit button on AddEntryPage is enabled and functional without signing in
No sign-in prompt or authentication error is shown when a visitor tries to submit an entry
A visitor can enter their name and message and successfully submit the form anonymously

file_operations.description: Remove the authentication requirement check that blocks form submission for anonymous users. Update the form submission logic to allow unauthenticated visitors to submit entries. Remove any conditional rendering of error messages or disabled states tied to authentication status. Ensure the form is fully accessible and submittable without Internet Identity login.

Update the addEntry mutation hook to work with both authenticated and anonymous actors. Ensure the mutation does not require authentication and can successfully call the backend addEntry function with an anonymous principal.
